title: physalis viscosa var. maritima
intro: Physalis viscosa var. maritima, also known as the coastal ground cherry, is a variety of plant within the Physalis viscosa species, belonging to the nightshade family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Physalis viscosa var. maritima include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial activities. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
